description: At the end of the month, a billing coordinator needs to generate an invoice for a client.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all unbilled time entries and expenses for a specific client matter for the last month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all billable items for the client.

nodes.task_description: Generate a draft invoice, itemizing all time entries and expenses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a detailed draft bill.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft invoice to the responsible partner for review and approval before sending to the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows the firm's pre-bill review process.
